summary: Comprehensive testing of Prisma migration features - All 16 backend tests passed and all frontend features verified. Full profiler flow (name→age→income→state→complete) works via Prisma. Mobile-first WhatsApp-style chat UI with Hindi voice buttons, blue double ticks, sidebar with demo toggle and analytics link all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns version 2.0.0 ✓
Backend: POST /api/auth/send-otp with phone='9999777701' returns success ✓
Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with phone='9999777701' otp='1234' returns success with valid user_id (24-char MongoDB ObjectId) ✓
Backend: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns failure ✓
Backend: POST /api/chat with greeting triggers profiler asking 'आपका नाम क्या है?' (profiler_field='name') ✓
Backend: POST /api/chat answering name then asks age (profiler_field='age') ✓
Backend: POST /api/chat answering age then asks income (profiler_field='income') ✓
Backend: POST /api/chat answering income then asks state (profiler_field='state') ✓
Backend: POST /api/chat answering state completes profile with type='profiler_complete', pdf_url, and eligibility_results ✓
Backend: GET /api/profile/{user_id} returns profile with name, age, income, state from Prisma ✓
Backend: GET /api/chat/history/{user_id} returns all chat messages from Prisma ChatLog ✓
Backend: GET /api/schemes returns 3+ schemes from Prisma Scheme table ✓
Backend: POST /api/search-schemes with query='farmer' returns match ✓
Backend: DEMO_MODE: POST /api/chat with 'Mera beta 10th pass hai' returns instant Vidyasiri result + PDF ✓
Backend: GET /api/analytics/status returns enabled and dashboard_url ✓
Backend: Demo toggle endpoints (GET status, POST toggle) work correctly ✓
Frontend: Login page with phone + OTP works (data-testid='phone-input', 'send-otp-btn', 'otp-input', 'verify-otp-btn') ✓
Frontend: Chat page shows profiler questions one at a time in Hindi ✓
Frontend: Blue double ticks on user messages (data-testid='tick-blue') ✓
Frontend: Hindi voice button visible on bot messages (data-testid='hindi-voice-btn') ✓
Frontend: Sidebar with demo toggle (data-testid='demo-toggle-row', 'demo-toggle-btn') ✓
Frontend: Sidebar with analytics link (data-testid='sidebar-analytics-link') ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Prisma Client Python (async) properly integrated with User, Scheme, ChatLog models
User.profile stores JSON as string (serialized/deserialized correctly)
ChatLog.message stores rich message objects as JSON strings (parsed correctly)
Motor only used for otp_sessions collection (not in Prisma schema)
user_id is MongoDB ObjectId format (24-char hex) as expected
4-step profiler flow correctly asks one question at a time
DEMO_MODE fast-path correctly bypasses profiler and returns instant Vidyasiri result
All data-testid attributes present for testing (phone-input, send-otp-btn, otp-input, verify-otp-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn, hindi-voice-btn, tick-blue, demo-toggle-btn, sidebar-analytics-link)
Hindi voice uses browser SpeechSynthesis API (no external service)
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers with timestamps to avoid conflicts with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified full Prisma migration. All backend APIs working: auth (send-otp, verify-otp), chat (profiler flow), profile, schemes, search-schemes, demo toggle, analytics. Frontend verified: login flow, chat with profiler, Hindi voice buttons, blue ticks, sidebar with demo toggle and analytics link. Phone numbers used in tests are timestamp-based to ensure fresh users each run. DEMO_MODE=true in backend/.env.

mocked_apis_list: Auth: Static OTP 1234 for any phone number
Transcription: Mock Sarvam fallback returns demo Hindi text
DEMO_MODE: Hardcoded Vidyasiri + PM-KISAN results with PDF generation
Hindi TTS: Browser SpeechSynthesis API (no external service)
